steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun must refer to “many historical newspapers” and “these rare items”—both are plural.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: The pronoun must agree in number with its plural antecedent. “Them” is the only plural choice and correctly matches. The other three choices are singular and violate pronoun-antecedent agreement. This matches choice B — B is correct.
